recommendations.title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
recommendations.overview: The true story of the "Flying Sikh" world champion runner and Olympian Milkha Singh who overcame the massacre of his family, civil war during the India-Pakistan partition, and homelessness to become one of India's most iconic athletes.

recommendations.title: A Mermaid in Paris
recommendations.overview: A man rescues a mermaid in Paris and slowly falls in love with her.

recommendations.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
recommendations.overview: Raj is a rich, carefree, happy-go-lucky second generation NRI. Simran is the daughter of Chaudhary Baldev Singh, who in spite of being an NRI is very strict about adherence to Indian values. Simran has left for India to be married to her childhood fi

recommendations.title: Airlift
recommendations.overview: When Iraq invades Kuwait in August, 1990, a callous Indian businessman becomes the spokesperson for more than 170,000 stranded countrymen.

recommendations.title: The Deep Blue Sea
recommendations.overview: The wife of a British Judge is caught in a self-destructive love affair with a Royal Air Force pilot.

recommendations.title: Something from Tiffany's
recommendations.overview: One woman's life is forever changed by an engagement ring meant for someone else.

recommendations.title: Humpty Sharma Ki Dulhania
recommendations.overview: A girl from Ambala, Kavya Pratap Singh, is about to be married. When she visits Delhi to shop for her 'dhai lakh ka Ghagra'(wedding dress worth Rs. 2.5 Lakh), she meets Humpty Sharma, a carefree Delhiite, and falls in love with him.

recommendations.title: Firebird
recommendations.overview: At the height of the Cold War, a troubled soldier forms a forbidden love triangle with a daring fighter pilot and his female comrade amid the dangerous surroundings of a Soviet Air Force Base.

recommendations.title: Sholay
recommendations.overview: After his family is slain by the notorious bandit Gabbar Singh, former Inspector Thakur Baldev Singh enlists low-level outlaws Jai and Veeru to capture Gabbar and seek revenge.

recommendations.title: M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story
recommendations.overview: Based on the life story of Mahendra Singh Dhoni, and his journey to being the world cup winning captain of the Indian cricket team.
